authors: Seth C. Lewis Rodrigo Zamith Jon Benedik A. Bunquin a University of Oregon
raw_title: Technological Hype and AI in Journalism: Five Functions and Why They Matter
title_en: Technological Hype and AI in Journalism: Five Functions and Why They Matter
title_zh: 技术炒作与新闻业中的人工智能：五大功能及其重要性
plain_summary_zh: 这篇论文探讨了人工智能在新闻业中的应用，特别关注技术炒作现象。文章提出了人工智能在新闻工作中的五大功能，并解释了为什么这些功能对新闻行业很重要。
plain_summary_en: This paper examines the application of artificial intelligence in journalism, with a particular focus on technological hype. It identifies five key functions of AI in journalistic work and explains why these functions matter to the news industry.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字新闻领域的技术创新与媒体实践，特别关注人工智能等新兴技术如何影响新闻生产、传播和行业生态。
research_direction_en: Investigating technological innovation and media practices in digital journalism, with particular attention to how emerging technologies like artificial intelligence affect news production, dissemination, and industry ecosystems.
